latest.title: Investor Webinar Friday 17th July
latest.content:
Today 14:00
RNS Number : 5059M
CleanTech Lithium PLC
15 July 2026
15 July 2026
CleanTech Lithium PLC ("CTL", CleanTech Lithium" or the "Company")
Investor Webinar Friday 17th July
CleanTech Lithium PLC (AIM: CTL, Frankfurt:T2N) an exploration and development company, advancing sustainable lithium projects in Chile, announces that Chief Executive Officer, Ignacio Mehech, will host a live investor webinar via Investor Meet Company on 17 July 2026 at 14:00 BST.
Investors can expect a recap of ongoing company activities, including:
·
the ratification of the Laguna Verde Special Lithium Operating Contract (CEOL);
·
the proposed ASX dual-listing;
·
the selection of a strategic partner to support the financing and development of the Laguna Verde project; and
·
recent progress on Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE) work and further key project milestones.
Investors can register free via the following link:
https://www.investormeetcompany.com/cleantech-lithium-plc/register-investor
Investors who already follow CleanTech Lithium PLC on the Investor Meet Company platform will automatically be invited via email and the platform.
For further information contact:
CleanTech Lithium PLC
Ignacio Mehech/Gordon Stein/Nick Baxter
Office: +44 (0) 1534 668 321
Mobile: +44 (0) 7494 630 360
Email: info@ctlithium.com

About Reach announcements
This is a Reach announcement. Reach is an investor communication service aimed at assisting listed and unlisted (including AIM quoted) companies to distribute media only / non-regulatory news releases into the public domain. Information required to be notified under the AIM Rules for Companies, Market Abuse Regulation or other regulation would be disseminated as an RNS regulatory announcement and not on Reach.
Notes
CleanTech Lithium (AIM:CTL, Frankfurt:T2N) is an exploration and development company advancing lithium projects in Chile for the clean energy transition. CleanTech Lithium has two key lithium projects in Chile, Laguna Verde and Viento Andino, and exploration stage project in Arenas Blancas (Salar de Atacama), located in the lithium triangle, a leading centre for battery grade lithium production. CleanTech Lithium and the Mining Ministry in Chile have agreed the contractual terms for the Special Lithium Operating Contract ("CEOL") for Laguna Verde, subject to final ratification.
CleanTech Lithium is committed to utilising Direct Lithium Extraction ("DLE") with reinjection of spent brine. Direct Lithium Extraction is a transformative technology which removes lithium from brine with higher recoveries, short development lead times and no extensive evaporation pond construction. For more information, please visit:
www.ctlithium.com
**ENDS**

latest.title: Result of GM, TVR and Options Award
latest.content:
Today 15:34
RNS Number : 6733K
CleanTech Lithium PLC
01 July 2026
THIS ANNOUNCEMENT AND THE INFORMATION CONTAINED HEREIN IS RESTRICTED AND IS NOT FOR RELEASE, PUBLICATION OR DISTRIBUTION, IN WHOLE OR IN PART, DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, IN, INTO OR FROM THE UNITED STATES, AUSTRALIA, CANADA, JAPAN, NEW ZEALAND, THE REPUBLIC OF SOUTH AFRICA OR ANY OTHER JURISDICTION IN WHICH SUCH RELEASE, PUBLICATION OR DISTRIBUTION WOULD BE UNLAWFUL.
1 July 2026
CleanTech Lithium PLC ("CTL", CleanTech Lithium" or the "Company")
Results of GM, Total Voting Rights and Options Award
CleanTech Lithium PLC (
AIM: CTL, Frankfurt:T2N), an
exploration and development company advancing sustainable lithium projects in Chile
, is pleased to announce that all resolutions were passed at the General Meeting ("GM") held earlier today.
Therefore, a total of 55,007,875 new Ordinary Shares comprising 40,339,576 Conditional Placing Shares, 10,063,749 Retail Offer Shares and 4,604,550 Subscription Shares (each as defined in the Company's Circular published on 9 June 2026) (together the "New Ordinary Shares"), for which application has been made, are expected to be admitted to trading on AIM at 8.00 a.m. on 2 July 2026 ("Admission").
As set out in the Circular, Steve Kesler agreed to satisfy amounts owed to him by the Company, being £276,273, by subscribing for 4,604,550 Subscription Shares at the Issue Price. Furthermore, Steve Kesler has notified the Company that he is transferring 359,090 Ordinary Shares for nil consideration from his individual account into a joint account with his wife. Following Admission, Steve Kesler will be interested in 4,963,640 Ordinary Shares representing 1.37 per cent. of the Company's enlarged ordinary share capital following the Admission.
Options Award
Following shareholder approval the Company has today awarded a total of 19,966,431 new options
under the Company's existing Share Option Plan. Options are subject to the various conditions set out in paragraph 11 of the Circular. Out of the total amount 18,166,431 options have been awarded to PDMRs with further information set out in the PDMR notification below.
Total voting rights
Following Admission, the Company will have a total of
362,991,716
Ordinary Shares in issue. The Company does not hold any Ordinary Shares in treasury and accordingly as from Admission the total number of voting rights in the Company will be 362,991,716.
With effect from Admission, this figure may be used by shareholders as the denominator for the calculations by which they will determine if they are required to notify their interest in, or a change to their interest in the Company, under the Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules of the Financial Conduct Authority.
The New Ordinary Shares will, when issued, be credited as fully paid and will rank pari passu in all respects with the existing ordinary shares of the Company.
For further information contact:
CleanTech Lithium PLC
Ignacio Mehech/Gordon Stein/Nick Baxter
Office: +44 (0) 1534 668 321
Mobile: +44 (0) 7494 630 360
Email: info@ctlithium.com
Beaumont Cornish Limited (Nominated Adviser)
Roland Cornish/Asia Szusciak
+44 (0) 20 7628 3396
Fox-Davies Capital, a trading name of CAL Investments Limited (Capital Markets Adviser and Sole Bookrunner)
Daniel Fox-Davies
+44 (0) 20 3884 8450
daniel@fox-davies.com
Canaccord Genuity (Broker)
James Asensio
+44 (0) 20 7523 4680
Beaumont Cornish Limited ("Beaumont Cornish") is the Company's Nominated Adviser and is authorised and regulated by the FCA. Beaumont Cornish's responsibilities as the Company's Nominated Adviser, including a responsibility to advise and guide the Company on its responsibilities under the AIM Rules for Companies and AIM Rules for Nominated Advisers, are owed solely to the London Stock Exchange. Beaumont Cornish is not acting for and will not be responsible to any other persons for providing protections afforded to customers of Beaumont Cornish nor for advising them in relation to the proposed arrangements described in this announcement or any matter referred to in it.
Notes
CleanTech Lithium (AIM:CTL, Frankfurt:T2N) is an exploration and development company advancing lithium projects in Chile for the clean energy transition. CleanTech Lithium has two key lithium projects in Chile, Laguna Verde and Viento Andino, and exploration stage project in Arenas Blancas (Salar de Atacama), located in the lithium triangle, a leading centre for battery grade lithium production. CleanTech Lithium and the Mining Ministry in Chile have agreed the contractual terms for the Special Lithium Operating Contract ("CEOL") for Laguna Verde, subject to final ratification.
CleanTech Lithium is committed to utilising Direct Lithium Extraction ("DLE") with reinjection of spent brine. Direct Lithium Extraction is a transformative technology which removes lithium from brine with higher recoveries, short development lead times and no extensive evaporation pond construction. For more information, please visit:
www.ctlithium.com

latest.title: CEOL Update and CFO Position
latest.content:
Today 07:00
RNS Number : 7347J
CleanTech Lithium PLC
25 June 2026
THIS ANNOUNCEMENT AND THE INFORMATION CONTAINED HEREIN IS RESTRICTED AND IS NOT FOR RELEASE, PUBLICATION OR DISTRIBUTION, IN WHOLE OR IN PART, DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, IN, INTO OR FROM THE UNITED STATES, AUSTRALIA, CANADA, JAPAN, NEW ZEALAND, THE REPUBLIC OF SOUTH AFRICA OR ANY OTHER JURISDICTION IN WHICH SUCH RELEASE, PUBLICATION OR DISTRIBUTION WOULD BE UNLAWFUL.
25 June 2026
CleanTech Lithium PLC ("CTL", CleanTech Lithium" or the "Company")
CEOL Update and CFO Position
CleanTech Lithium PLC (AIM: CTL, Frankfurt:T2N), an
exploration and development company
advancing sustainable lithium projects in Chile, shares an update on the CEOL process and CFO position.
CEOL Update
The Company had expected ratification of the CEOL to take place in Q2 2026, however, the administrative process with the Comptroller General's Office is taking longer than anticipated as it works through all the CEOL decrees put forward by the previous Government. CEO Ignacio Mehech has met with the new Government representatives on several occasions and is encouraged by their support for the Company's ambitions at Laguna Verde and looks forward to the signing of the CEOL later this year.
CFO Position
It was announced on 11 August 2025 that CFO and Director Gordon Stein would step down from the Board as a director but remain as CFO. The Board engaged Mr Stein under a consulting agreement in February 2026 to lead the process to select a strategic partner to fund the next stage of project development and also to progress the dual listing on the ASX and as these matters are ongoing, Mr Stein's consulting agreement has now been extended from 30 June 2026 to the end of September 2026 when it will be reviewed again.
For further information contact:
CleanTech Lithium PLC

latest.title: CEO to Attend Fastmarkets in Las Vegas, USA
latest.content:

RNS Number : 5584I
CleanTech Lithium PLC
17 June 2026
17 June 2026
CleanTech Lithium PLC ("CTL", CleanTech Lithium" or the "Company")
CEO to Attend Fastmarkets in Las Vegas, USA
CleanTech Lithium PLC (AIM: CTL), an
exploration and development company
advancing sustainable lithium projects in Chile
, is pleased to confirm that its CEO Ignacio Mehech will attend the Fastmarkets Global Lithium, Battery and Critical Materials event taking place in Las Vegas from 22 to 25 June. The event presents a great opportunity for the CEO to meet key players in the battery value supply chain as part of the process to select a strategic partner.
The Company has also updated its investor presentation which includes links to recent independent analyst coverage. The presentation is available
here
.

latest.title: Director Subscription
latest.content:
Today 07:00
RNS Number : 3794I
CleanTech Lithium PLC
16 June 2026
THIS ANNOUNCEMENT AND THE INFORMATION CONTAINED HEREIN IS RESTRICTED AND IS NOT FOR RELEASE, PUBLICATION OR DISTRIBUTION, IN WHOLE OR IN PART, DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, IN, INTO OR FROM THE UNITED STATES, AUSTRALIA, CANADA, JAPAN, NEW ZEALAND, THE REPUBLIC OF SOUTH AFRICA OR ANY OTHER JURISDICTION IN WHICH SUCH RELEASE, PUBLICATION OR DISTRIBUTION WOULD BE UNLAWFUL.
16 June 2026
CleanTech Lithium PLC ("CTL", CleanTech Lithium" or the "Company")
Director Subscription
CleanTech Lithium PLC (AIM: CTL, Frankfurt:T2N), an
exploration and development company
advancing sustainable lithium projects in Chile, announces that Steve Kesler, Non-Executive Chairman,
has subscribed for 4,604,550 new Ordinary Shares in the Company (the "Subscription Shares") at a price of 6 pence per share.
As set out in "the Fundraising and Conversion of Loan Notes" announcement published on 4 June 2026 ("Launch Announcement"), Steve Kesler confirmed his intention to subscribe for the Subscription Shares to settle accrued director's fees owed to him by the Company. Following the announcement of the Company's financial results for the year ended 31 December 2025, the Company is no longer in a closed period, and Steve Kesler is now permitted to subscribe for the Subscription Shares. On the same basis as the Fundraising,
the Subscription Shares carry a warrant entitlement of one Warrant for every two Subscription Shares subscribed for. Each Warrant grants the holder the right to subscribe for one new Ordinary Share at a price of 9 pence per share.
The Subscription as well as the grant of Warrants remains subject to the Resolutions being passed at the General Meeting to be held on 1 July 2026.
Words and expressions defined in the Launch Announcement shall have the same meaning in this announcement.
For further information contact:
CleanTech Lithium PLC
Ignacio Mehech/Gordon Stein/Nick Baxter

company_30s.what_they_do: CTL Ltd. is a small mining company focused on lithium exploration and development in Chile. They aim to secure mining licences and bring a lithium project to production.
company_30s.why_they_matter: Lithium is a key raw material for batteries powering electric cars, data centres and portable devices. The global shift to green energy is driving demand, making any new lithium source potentially valuable.
company_30s.current_state: The firm is still in the early stages of securing permits and funding. It has recently announced a series of investor events and licence updates, but no clear production milestones yet. The share price is trading at a very low level relative to its historic highs, reflecting a steep decline.

rns_narrative: CTL is actively engaging investors with webinars and financial updates, signalling a push to raise capital and keep the project alive.
The company has been filing regular updates on Chilean licence negotiations and management changes, indicating a focus on regulatory compliance.
Recent announcements hint at a possible fast‑track approval for a new lithium licence, which could be a turning point for the project.

crowd_tape.dominant_theme: Silent hope – the community is quiet but optimistic about a potential licence win.
crowd_tape.bull_narrative: Bullish chatter comes mainly from a handful of traders who see the licence update as a catalyst for a sharp rebound.
crowd_tape.bear_narrative: Bear voices point to the risk of regulatory delays and the lack of any concrete production plan, warning that the company could still fall flat.
crowd_tape.sentiment_shift: Sentiment is currently low but shows a slight uptick after the latest licence announcement, suggesting a possible shift towards optimism if the approval materialises.

whats_happening_now.attention_check: Google Trends shows no recent spikes, so the market is largely unaware of the latest developments – a perfect environment for a surprise bounce.

near_term_catalysts: A formal licence approval from the Chilean authorities – the company’s latest update suggests this could happen within the next 3–6 months.
A funding round that brings in new equity or convertible debt – the investor webinars indicate a push to secure capital.
A surge in lithium prices that raises the project's economic viability – a market move above $100 per kilogram could trigger renewed interest.
expect_next.watch_for: Look for a sudden spike in trading volume and a break above the recent support level that marks the bottom of the current trough. A clear upward trend in the price chart accompanied by a bullish candlestick pattern would confirm the mean‑reversion thesis.
expect_next.timing_regime: The stock appears to be in the early stages of a deep crash, with capitulation likely already complete. The APEX score suggests a tight compression that could lead to a sharp breakout once a catalyst materialises.

buy_vs_sell.bull_case: The company sits at a very low price after a steep decline, giving a large upside if the licence is granted and the project moves forward. A 50% recovery to the mid‑range of the 52‑week range would double the current price – a classic asymmetric payoff for a deep crash.
buy_vs_sell.bear_case: If the licence approval stalls or the project fails to secure sufficient funding, the share could sink further or even be delisted. The worst scenario is a total collapse to zero.
buy_vs_sell.risk_reward: Potential loss is limited to the current price (a 100% drop), while upside could be 50% or more if the project gains traction. The reward‑to‑risk ratio is therefore roughly 1.5:1, favouring a contrarian bet.

playbook.if_bullish: Enter on a pullback to the recent support level, size the position so that a 20‑day stop loss below that level limits loss to about 10% of the entry price. Use a trailing stop that locks in gains once the price moves above the 50‑day moving average.
playbook.if_watching: Wait for a clear volume spike and a bullish reversal pattern (e.g., a bullish engulfing candle) at the bottom of the current trough. Confirm with a short‑term moving‑average crossover before committing.
playbook.if_passing: There are no immediate delisting or bankruptcy signals, so the setup does not warrant a negative outlook.
